name: Cargocopter
notes: The Air-domain counterpart to Transport Truck (Land) and HMS Cuddles/Tank Carrier (Naval). Its stealth enables undetected transport of Infantry across bases. Fully unarmed like the other transports (canTarget: []). cargoAllowedTags is Infantry-only, unlike Tank Carrier's Land+Infantry mix — a helicopter airlift, not an armor landing craft. cargoRequiresBuildingDock is true: unlike every other transport, it can only board/unload Infantry while sitting on a Hangar hex (a helicopter needs a landing pad, not open ground) — see data/troops/schema.json's cargoRequiresBuildingDock note and CargoSystem.
